message: Morning, all. Got the jalapeño corn dog copy up - spent the morning really trying to honor what makes this work, the way the cornmeal crust plays against the heat of the pepper. Curious what lands and what doesn't.
I read through it this morning and the cornmeal detail actually stuck with me - think we're onto something real here?
That means a lot - I was worried I'd buried it under too much explanation, so hearing it landed clean is exactly the push I needed.
That's exactly why I flagged it - the texture stuff gives people something to *taste* when they read it, you know?
Texture sells better than nostalgia - keep that cornmeal language, cut everything else that's just sentiment.
Margaret's right - strip the sentiment, keep the cornmeal. Marcus, can you send the clean version over so we can call this locked?
